title: Backfill tx.begin and ops task fallback fixes
summary: Completed tx.begin backfill in commit flow, ops task fallback for missing task_id, and added regression coverage.
outputs: tx.begin backfill logic in commit flow
write-time invariant adjustment for tx.begin acceptance
ops task update/end fallback to active transaction
regression tests for missing tx.begin and missing task_id
acceptance_criteria: commit_if_verified inserts tx.begin when tx_event_log is empty and tx_state is present.
tx.begin is accepted when the event log is empty and an active transaction exists.
ops_update_task and ops_end_task work without task_id by reusing the active transaction id.
pytest coverage run passes with the new regression tests.

steps.description: Add tx.begin backfill and invariant adjustments for empty event logs.
Implement ops task fallback to active transaction when task_id is missing.
Add regression tests covering both behaviors.

notes: Completion: added tx.begin backfill, active-tx fallback for ops tasks, and regression tests.
Keep invariants aligned with lifecycle_invariants.md while allowing recovery from missing tx_event_log.
Prefer minimal changes that preserve existing event ordering.
